conflicting_signals: Bearish initiation printed at 2349.32 and buying exhaustion appeared at 2356.15 and 2373.0, limiting clean upside follow-through.

supporting_signals: 15m EMA regime is bullish, price is still above the 15m value-area high, and 15m CVD remains positive.
A dense support cluster sits at 2347.11 with eight structural references, just above session value support at 2346.72.
Selling exhaustion near 2349.57, hidden bullish divergence, bullish absorption, and bullish whale delta all support dip-buying.

conflicting_signals: Daily buying exhaustion is the strongest opposing signal, with a heavy bearish score and notable exhaustion prints at 2356.15 and 2373.0.

1d.risk: If 2346.72 fails, the bullish daily auction can fall back into prior value toward 2332.62, with 2317.86 the next structural support.

The lower edge of the 4h bracket is defended by a dense 2346.72-2345.09 support cluster tied to POC, TPO, and value support.

stage_1_setup_scan_json.market_narrative: The daily backdrop is still bullish and well above major trend anchors, but price is currently balancing on the 4h inside a 2346.7-2365.1/2365.7 value bracket rather than trending cleanly. On the 15m, price is pressing the lower edge of that balance with bullish support signals competing against recent exhaustion and bearish initiation, so the next decision likely comes from whether 2346.7-2347.1 holds for a rotation back toward 2359-2365 or fails into a deeper corrective auction.
